channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How Trump's 'Complete and Total Endorsement' transformed the Republican Party
item.description: An NPR analysis of over a thousand Trump endorsements in House, Senate, and governor races over the past decade shows the president now selects candidates.

item.title: Lebanese residents struggle to survive in ancient city under Israeli evacuation order
item.description: In one of Lebanon's oldest cities, once besieged by Alexander the Great, ordinary people face daily challenges amid Israeli attacks.

item.title: Iranian president travels to Pakistan amid U.S.-Iran talks on ending war
item.description: President Masoud Pezeshkian's visit to Islamabad occurs as technical teams finalize details following high-level negotiations in Switzerland.

item.title: Struggling to get insurance coverage for weight loss drugs? Here's what you need to know
item.description: If your doctor prescribes a GLP-1 medication for weight loss and your insurance denies it, you have alternatives.
